assertions.text: AreaExtra type includes ContextMenuExtra in the union
assertions.evidence: `type AreaExtra = ReactArea2D<Schemes> | ContextMenuExtra | MinimapExtra;` — all three extras included.

assertions.text: AreaExtra type includes MinimapExtra in the union
assertions.evidence: MinimapExtra is included in the AreaExtra union type.

assertions.text: render.addPreset(Presets.contextMenu.setup()) is called to register context menu rendering
Uses HistoryExtensions.keyboard(history) for keybindings rather than a manual addEventListener
assertions.evidence: `HistoryExtensions.keyboard(history)` called — uses the official helper from rete-history-plugin.

assertions.text: Context menu uses correct nested category format with 'Data' and 'Sink' subcategories
